At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>The Growth Product team builds products and systems that accelerate Samsara's go-to-market engine — turning customer demand into revenue across the customer lifecycle, from acquisition through renewal.&nbsp;</p> <p>We’re looking for a Product Manager to drive revenue growth by building products that increase customer lead acquisition, expand revenue pipeline generation, and enable sellers and marketers to operate faster and more effectively. You will partner closely with Engineering, Design, Sales, Marketing, and GTM teams to lead products that influence $XXXM+ in revenue pipeline and XXXK+ leads annually.</p> <p>This role is a great fit if you’re passionate about growing businesses through exceptional product experiences, enjoy operating across complex systems, and thrive in environments where data, experimentation, and customer empathy guide decisions. Our team also ships fast and builds with AI at every layer — our engineers build with Cursor, our PMs prototype with Claude and ChatGPT, and we're constantly pushing to automate, accelerate, and compound our impact through AI-native workflows. If you're excited about applying AI to real GTM problems, you'll fit right in.</p> <p><strong>This is a remote role and open to candidates based in the United States. The hiring manager for this role is David Benac.</strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world:</strong> Your efforts will result in real-world impact – helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, reduce emissions, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>You are the architect of your own career:</strong> If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. We set up our employees for success and have built a culture that encourages rapid career development, countless opportunities to experiment and master your craft in a hyper growth environment.</li> <li><strong>You’re energized by our opportunity:</strong> The vision we have to digitize large sectors of the global economy requires your full focus and best efforts to bring forth creative, ambitious ideas for our customers.</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own the strategy, roadmap, and execution for growth products that power Samsara's revenue engine — including customer acquisition funnels, revenue pipeline generation tools, lead management infrastructure, and AI-powered GTM AI tooling.</li> <li>Build and scale lead-generating products such as Direct Mail and referral loops.</li> <li>Improve and extend Samsara's lead management platform — the system that ingests, enriches, matches, deduplicates, and scores every inbound customer lead — to increase data quality, processing speed, and conversion rates.</li> <li>Apply AI and LLMs to GTM workflows — whether that's improving lead scoring models, automating content generation, enriching data with AI agents, or building smarter seller-facing tools.</li> <li>Partner deeply with Sales, Marketing, Sales Ops, Revenue Technology, and Engineering to understand GTM workflows, identify pain points, and ship products that eliminate friction and accelerate revenue.</li> <li>Define and track success metrics (revenue generated, ROI, lead quality, processing speed, adoption) to measure impact and guide prioritization.</li> <li>Integrate experimentation and data-driven decision-making into the product development process, running A/B tests and growth experiments to optimize outcomes.</li> <li>Collaborate with engineering and design to build intuitive, reliable, and scalable products that sellers and marketers trust and love to use.</li> <li>Champion and model Samsara's cultural principles — Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, and Win as a Team.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor's degree in a technical field or equivalent practical experience.</li> <li>2+ years of experience in product management, growth, or a related role building and shipping products.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to take products from concept through launch and iteration in fast-paced environments.</li> <li>Experience working cross-functionally with engineering, design, and business stakeholders to deliver impact.</li> <li>Strong analytical skills and comfort working with product metrics, business data, and experimentation frameworks.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate product strategy, trade-offs, and results to both technical and non-technical audiences.</li> <li>Bias toward action and comfort operating hands-on in ambiguous, rapidly evolving problem spaces.</li> <li>Strong product instincts and a keen eye for user experience, with the ability to simplify complex workflows.</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience building internal tools or growth products used by Sales, Marketing, or Revenue Operations teams.</li> <li>Familiarity with lead management systems, CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce), or marketing automation tools (e.g., Marketo, HubSpot).</li> <li>Experience with B2B growth product management, including pipeline generation, lead flow optimization, or direct mail / gifting programs at scale.</li> <li>Hands-on experience running experiments (A/B tests, funnel optimization, cohort analysis) to improve product and business outcomes.</li> <li>Experience building or managing AI-powered product features — such as LLM-based workflows, AI agents, data enrichment, scoring models, or content automation.</li> <li>Comfort using AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) in your own day-to-day work to move faster and think bigger.</li> <li>Understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market motions and how product, sales, and marketing work together to drive revenue.</li> <li>MBA or Master's degree in a technical or business field.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">The range of annual base salary for full-time employees for this position is below. Please note that base pay offered may vary depending on factors including your city of residence, job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual Base Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$100,257.50</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$168,500 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. We want owners, not passengers, which is why <a href="https://www.samsara.com/company/careers/benefits">our rewards</a> are designed to fuel high-impact builders. Our compensation program delivers above-market total compensation through a combination of base salary, performance-based bonus/variable pay, and equity (for eligible roles) in a high-growth public company. We meaningfully differentiate pay for our top performers, who have the opportunity to earn above-market compensation that can outpace the broader market over time.</p> <p>Beyond compensation, we provide the foundations that enable long-term success: a flexible, employee-led remote model, a professional development stipend, comprehensive health and parental leave plans, and more. If you’re ready to build for the long term and own the outcome, your journey starts here.</p> <p><strong>Flexible Working&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Samsara, we embrace a flexible working model that caters to the diverse needs of our teams. Our offices are open for those who prefer to work in-person and we also support remote work where it aligns with our operational requirements. For certain positions, being close to one of our offices or within a specific geographic area is important to facilitate collaboration, access to resources, or alignment with our service regions. In these cases, the job description will clearly indicate any working location requirements. Our goal is to ensure that all members of our team can contribute effectively, whether they are working on-site, in a hybrid model, or fully remotely. All offers of employment are contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the company and in the specified work location, if applicable.</span></p> <p><strong>Belonging at Samsara</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we welcome everyone regardless of their background. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, and other characteristics protected by law. We depend on the unique approaches of our team members to help us solve complex problems and want to ensure that Samsara is a place where people from all backgrounds can make an impact.</p> <p><strong>Accommodations&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Samsara is an inclusive work environment, and we are committed to ensuring equal opportunity in employment for qualified persons with disabilities. Please email <a href="mailto:accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com">accessibleinterviewing@samsara.com</a> or <a href="https://forms.gle/DrM6DFQUiSgfPtCVA">click here</a> if you require any reasonable accommodations throughout the recruiting process.</p> <p><strong>Our Commitment to Authenticity</strong></p> <p>We use <a href="https://hiretofu.com/privacyPolicy">Tofu</a>, a fraud detection tool, to validate the authenticity of applications and protect against identity fraud. jobs.title: Solutions Integration Enginer III
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Who we are</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Samsara (NYSE: IOT) is the pioneer of the Connected Operations™ Cloud, which is a platform that enables organizations that depend on physical operations to harness Internet of Things (IoT) data to develop actionable insights and improve their operations. At Samsara, we are helping improve the safety, efficiency and sustainability of the physical operations that power our global economy. Representing more than 40% of global GDP, these industries are the infrastructure of our planet, including agriculture, construction, field services, transportation, and manufacturing — and we are excited to help digitally transform their operations at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 300; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working at Samsara means you’ll help define the future of physical operations and be on a team that’s shaping an exciting array of product solutions, including Video-Based Safety, Vehicle Telematics, Apps and Driver Workflows, and Equipment Monitoring. As part of a recently public company, you’ll have the autonomy and support to make an impact as we build for the long term.</span></p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>As a Solutions Integration Engineer at Samsara, you will be an integral member of the Professional Services team responsible for helping Samsara’s most strategic customers build and implement B2B integrations with our IoT platform. In a given week, you may work with a large long-haul trucking company, an industrial-scale food producer, and a public utility to map a customer’s integration needs to current and future API capabilities, help building custom integrations, provide guidance and technical training to implementation teams to follow best practices, troubleshoot issues and advocate for fixes on behalf of customers (working with our tech support team), and ensure a successful customer relationship. A successful Solutions Integration Engineer at Samsara will develop a thorough understanding of B2B integrations to ensure the proper technical solution is delivered to our customers.</p> <p>Your role will be cross-functional, working alongside and connecting product managers, business operations, sales, and systems engineers, enabling you to experience multiple aspects of a hyper-growth company from within. Since Samsara is a fast-growing company with emerging IoT technology, you can expect this role to evolve, with opportunities to take on increasing levels of responsibility and impact our growth.</p> <p><strong>This is a remote position open to candidates residing in the US </strong><strong><u>except&nbsp;</u></strong><strong>Alaska, Austin Metro, Boulder Metro, California, Chicago Metro, Connecticut, Dallas Metro, Denver Metro, Houston Metro, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey, New York, Rhode Island, Seattle Metro, and Washington, D.C.&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world:</strong> Every phone call you answer and every email you send can affect whether truck drivers deliver goods on time and without accidents, whether students get dropped off safely from school, or whether power gets restored quickly after a natural disaster.</li> <li><strong>You thrive the most when solving problems: </strong>Our constantly expanding technology and the complexities faced by our customers provide an exciting range of challenges for our Customer Success teams. With a growth mindset and a desire to learn, you will strategically partner with our customers to find unique solutions to help keep their operations safe, efficient, and sustainable.</li> <li><strong>You are a natural relationship builder:</strong> Whether the relationship is with our customers or with cross-functional teams in Samsara, you are in constant communication and collaboration with key stakeholders to win as a team.</li> <li><strong>You are the architect of your own career: </strong>If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. This Customer Success team is still shaping its future and you will have plenty of liberty and opportunities to master your craft in a hyper growth environment.</li> <li><strong>You want to be with the best: </strong>At Samsara, we win together, celebrate together and support each other. You will be surrounded by the best and brightest professionals out there.</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Participate in system integration projects with customer development teams, and 3rd-party systems integrators to build enterprise-grade scalable solutions using Samsara APIs</li> <li>Create &amp; define project scopes, technical specifications, and business requirements between Samsara and multiple external stakeholders</li> <li>Build robust and scalable integration architecture to help solve use cases like Real-time Data Streaming, Event subscriptions, Batch processing, etc.</li> <li>Build, test, validate, and review code to ensure completeness and highest quality deliverables</li> <li>Advise and document best practices around integrations using Samara APIs and products</li> <li>Exchange best practices, share knowledge with the Samsara product team, and developer community, and advocate for customer experience</li> <li>Collaborate with Samsara’s Developer EcoSystem team closely to improve our API experience and feature set</li> <li>Contribute to the enhancement of Professional Services team methodologies and tools</li> <li>Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>3-5 years of experience developing Integration solutions using proven architecture methodologies</li> <li>Bilingual proficiency in English, Spanish, and French is a must</li> <li>Can write, read, and understand code in Python and one additional programming language (for example, JavaScript, AppScript)</li> <li>Experience with agentic workflows, including the design, orchestration, and deployment of multi-agent systems for enterprise use cases</li> <li>Proficient in leveraging LLM-based tools for code generation, prompt engineering, automation, and enhancing developer productivity</li> <li>Experience in developing solutions leveraging modern Cloud Services (AWS, Azure, or GCP)</li> <li>Comfortable&nbsp; in reviewing&nbsp; data integration requirements and translating them into good technical designs</li> <li>Comfortable in working with RESTful APIs/Webhooks and modern databases</li> <li>Comfortable in participating in customer evaluations and deployments, with the ability to juggle multiple customer engagements in parallel</li> <li>Strong written communication and presentation skills, demonstrated ability to work with a diverse set of teams</li> <li>Proficient in using GitHub for version control and collaboration</li> <li>Experience working with Modern Agile tools (e.g. Jira, Confluence)</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelors in Engineering, Computer Science, or related discipline</li> <li>Minimum 3+ years of - experience building&nbsp; Enterprise-scale integrations or API scripting</li> <li>Familiarity with B2B system integration projects and workflows</li> <li>Bias-to-action and hands-on experience delivering business results</li> <li>Tinkering with hardware gadgets, sensors, or vehicles is a plus</li> <li>Familiarity with fleets and logistics is a plus</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">The range of annual base salary for full-time employees for this position is below. Learn more about our total rewards and benefits below.</span></p></div><div class="title">Annual Base Salary</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$87,465</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$117,600 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Total Rewards</strong></p> <p>At Samsara, we build for the people who keep the global economy moving. Metro Area. Relocation assistance will not be provided for this position.&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><strong>You should apply if:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>You want to impact the industries that run our world:</strong> Your efforts will result in real-world impact—helping to keep the lights on, get food into grocery stores, reduce emissions, and most importantly, ensure workers return home safely.</li> <li><strong>You are the architect of your own career:</strong> If you put in the work, this role won’t be your last at Samsara. You will be surrounded by a high-caliber team that will encourage you to do your best.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>In this role, you will:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li><strong>Product Expertise</strong>: Become an expert on Samsara’s product portfolio of complete Internet of Things (“IoT”) solutions combining hardware, software, and cloud to bring real-time visibility, analytics, and AI to operations across multiple industries.</li> <li><strong>Technical Troubleshooting</strong>: Use your technical knowledge and product expertise to troubleshoot and resolve customer issues with medium to high complexity.</li> <li><strong>Responsiveness &amp; Resolution</strong>: Respond to customers and resolve their inquiries in a timely and helpful manner with a primary focus on meeting our SLA goals.</li> <li><strong>Documentation</strong>: Partner with Enablement to author and maintain customer-facing knowledge base articles to help improve the self-serviceability for our end users.</li> <li><strong>Partnerships</strong>: Work closely to develop partnerships with our Engineering and Product teams in order to reproduce bugs and build testbeds as necessary.</li> <li><strong>Feedback Loop</strong>: Provide direct feedback to Support Management for product and process improvements to help enhance the customer experience.</li> <li><strong>Team Player</strong>: Champion, role model, and embed Samsara’s cultural principles (Focus on Customer Success, Build for the Long Term, Adopt a Growth Mindset, Be Inclusive, Win as a Team) as we scale globally and across new offices.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum requirements for the role:</strong></p> <ul> <li>B.S. or equivalent work experience in Computer Science, Engineering (Mechanical/Electrical), Mathematics, Science, Business, or another analytical field.</li> <li>2-5 years of experience in support, engineering, or other technical roles.</li> <li>Strong familiarity with using CRMs like Zendesk or Salesforce.</li> <li>Technical know-how - you’re comfortable interfacing with engineers, translating complex technical concepts into everyday language, and working with SaaS systems.</li> <li>Excellent customer service and interpersonal skills coupled with the ability to influence individual contributors and leaders across the company.</li> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills, you can speak both Engineer and Human.</li> <li>Strong bias for action, ability to dive deep, and insistence on the highest standards.</li> <li>Ability to work in a hyper-growth environment with shifting priorities.</li> <li>Willingness to work flexible hours with the possibility of rotating coverage for some nights, weekends, and holidays.</li> </ul> <p><strong>An ideal candidate also has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with SaaS platform operations or you like tinkering with python, JSON, scripting, databases, or cloud systems.&nbsp;</li> <li>Bilingual proficiency in English and Spanish</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;">The range of annual base salary for full-time employees for this position is below. jobs.title: Manager, Customer Delivery
jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. With Fivetran, customer data arrives in their warehouses, canonical and ready to query, with no engineering or maintenance required. We’re proud that more organizations continue to leverage our technology every day to become truly data-driven.</p></div><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>About the Role</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Fivetran is building data pipelines to power the modern data stack for thousands of companies.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We’re hiring a Manager, Delivery Services to lead and evolve our implementation and advisory function across EMEA. This role is responsible for driving operational excellence, innovation, and AI-led transformation across our Delivery Services organisation, ensuring customers realise value quickly and at scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">You will lead a team of Customer Onboarding Managers (COMs) and Resident Solution Architects (RSAs), owning the end-to-end delivery motion across scoping, execution and customer outcomes. Sitting at the intersection of technical delivery, commercial impact and strategic transformation, you will play a critical role in how Services are delivered, scaled, and sold.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This is not just a role for someone to run the function; we are looking for a leader who will mature how we execute and closely support the team. You will bring rigour, introduce new ways of working and seek to embed AI both into how we operate and how we deliver for our customers.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This is a full-time position based remotely out of Ireland or the UK, with preference for Dublin or London.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Drive Operational Rigour and Delivery Excellence</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Own end-to-end accountability for Delivery Services, including scoping accuracy, delivery-to-scope, and delivery-to-budget</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Improve time-to-value (TTV) and reduce time-to-launch (TTL) across all customer engagements</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Drive utilisation and resource efficiency across the team</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Get into the details where needed: proactively managing risks, removing blockers and acting as a point of escalation from a Services perspective for customers and internal stakeholders alike</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Establish and enforce best-in-class delivery processes, tooling and governance</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Lead Innovation and Function Evolution</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Own the continuous evolution of the Delivery Services function, ensuring it keeps pace with customer needs, company growth and market expectations</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Maintain a clear, honest view of where the function is strong and where it needs to improve and take action accordingly</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Set the direction for how Delivery Services should operate at-scale and ensure that direction is reflected in how the team actually works day-to-day</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Drive meaningful, lasting improvements to how we deliver services: not just ideas, but changes that stick and raise the bar</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Make AI Core to How We Operate and Deliver</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Define how AI should be used across Delivery Services, both internally and in customer engagements</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Ensure AI is used to meaningfully improve efficiency, consistency and quality of delivery</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Set expectations for the team on where and how AI should be applied and hold a high bar for adoption</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Bring a clear, practical point of view on how AI reshapes professional services at Fivetran</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Lead, Motivate, and Elevate the Team</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Build a high-performing team culture with good vibes</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Coach and develop team members through regular 1:1s and structured career development plans</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Set clear expectations around performance, accountability and attention to detail</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Create an environment where the team can do their best work and enjoy doing it</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Bring Technical and Industry Credibility</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Act as a point of escalation for complex technical or delivery challenges</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Provide guidance on architecture, implementation strategy and best practices</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Partner effectively with technical stakeholders internally and externally</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Stay close to industry trends and bring informed perspectives into how we evolve our services</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proven experience leading onboarding, solution architect and/or professional services teams with strong control over scope, timelines and commercial outcomes for customers</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">A track record of improving how a function operates: not just running it, but making it measurably better</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Strong commercial instinct, with the ability to work closely with Sales to shape deals and position Services as a value driver, not a blocker</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Clear interest and capability in applying AI to improve internal efficiency and customer delivery in practical ways</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Ability to operate at both a strategic and on-the-ground level, getting into the detail where needed</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Strong technical credibility in data, SaaS or cloud environments, with the ability to engage and unblock technical stakeholders</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">A leadership style that drives high standards and accountability whilst maintaining good vibes</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience working cross-functionally with senior counterparts in Sales, Product, Engineering and Alliances (amongst others)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">A builder/operator mindset: someone who takes ownership and wants to continuously deliver improvement for the team and the company</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">#LI-LA1<br>#LI-REMOTE</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <p class="p-rich_text_section" style="line-height: 1.3;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Perks and Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li>100% employer-paid medical insurance<strong>*</strong></li> <li>Generous paid time-off policy (PTO), plus paid sick time, inclusive parental leave policy, holidays, and volunteer days off</li> <li>RSU stock grants*</li> <li>Professional development and training opportunities</li> <li>Company virtual happy hours, free food, and fun team-building activities</li> <li>Monthly cell phone stipend</li> <li>Access to an innovative mental health support platform that offers personalized care and resources in areas such as: therapy, coaching, and self-guided mindfulness exercises for all covered employees and their covered dependents.</li> </ul> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em><strong>*</strong>May vary by country and worker type - please reach out to your recruiter for more information</em></p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>Click <a href="https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1CdawUwjo1Q1B7ghZJ_owdmmHB8VtqhBu?usp=sharing" target="_blank">here</a> to learn more about Fivetran's Benefits by Region.</em></p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">We’re honored to be <a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran.com/blog/hvr-acquisition-series-d" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/blog/hvr-acquisition-series-d" data-sk="tooltip_parent">valued at over $5.6 billion</a>, but more importantly, we’re proud of our&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran.com/culture" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran.com/culture" data-sk="tooltip_parent">core values of Get Stuck In, Do the Right Thing, and One Team, One Dream</a>. Read about us in&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://fivetran-com.s3.amazonaws.com/news/forbes-aug-sept-2022-digital-reprint-10-21-22.pdf" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Forbes</a>.&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">Fivetran brings together high-quality talent across the globe to make data access as easy and reliable as electricity for our customers. We value and recognize that our customers benefit from having innovative teams made of people from many backgrounds, experiences, and identities. Fivetran promotes diversity, equity, inclusion &amp; belonging through attracting, recruiting, developing, and retaining a diverse workforce, not only because it is the right thing to do, but because it helps us build a world-class company to better serve our customers, our people and our communities.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about Fivetran’s culture and what it’s like to be part of the team, <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xlhtp4dGh8o" target="_blank">click here</a> and enjoy our video.</p> <p style="line-height: 1.3;">To learn more about our candidate privacy policy, you can <a href="https://fivetran.com/candidate-privacy" target="_blank">read our statement here</a>.</p> <hr> <p style="line-height: 1.3;"><em>We are committed to ensuring that all candidates have an equal opportunity to participate in our interview process. If you require accommodations at any stage of the process due to a disability, medical condition, or any other circumstance, please don't hesitate to submit your request by filling out this <a href="https://forms.gle/V7k3t4u9j523XkEt6">form</a>. We will work with you to provide reasonable accommodations to facilitate your participation and ensure a fair and accessible interview experience. Your request and any information provided will be kept confidential and will not impact your candidacy. We look forward to hearing from you and accommodating your needs to the best of our ability.</em></p></div>
